summary: Evaluated against the human-amended Done When (WFI-004 addenda). Evaluator verified all 19 manifest hashes; confirmed the OQ-001 resolution record (Cursor ~/.cursor/mcp.json mcpServers; VS Code user-profile mcp.json servers/type:stdio with OS paths) with source URLs and 2026-07-05 confirmation dates in the T-005 report addendum and consistent user-facing formats in USERGUIDE.md; three-way consistency with the frozen design.md installer format and REQ-008/009 exact; independently re-ran validate-layer-traceability (exit 0) and the scripted gates. design.md OQ-001 open in frozen bytes is expected under the freeze rule. Verdict PASS with two Minor.

findings.description: Re-running check-placeholders against the final report bytes flags a self-referential false positive: the literal filename check-placeholders.log inside the gate-time Outputs provenance table. The original green log was valid at capture time; USERGUIDE has zero matches.

The report body still narrates editing design.md directly (stale pre-freeze narrative, incl. a design.md hash 909a21c...); under WFI-004 design.md is frozen and correctly NOT modified (manifest shows the frozen hash 0f02d6...). Stale-narrative inconsistency, not a substantive defect.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
